SignWriting Keyboard Test Page

Inputs below should be recognized by the extension because at least one attribute equals SignWriting.

Recognized fields

SignWriting *

Non-matching fields

Notes about SignWriting transcription

Read-only display fields (Google Forms style)

SWU response: 𝠀񁳴񁳶񉌍񉌕񁳲񁳸𝠃𝤭𝤩񁳼𝣭𝣤񁳴𝤉𝣤񉌍𝤡𝣺񉌕𝣠𝣺񁳺𝣭𝤑񁳲𝤉𝤑

Empty SignWriting field (should NOT enhance — no SWU content): no SWU here

Plain SWU (should NOT enhance — no SignWriting label): 𝠀񁳴񁳶񉌍񉌕

Output of `prefilled` field (rendered)
